name: Tabs
description: A tab navigation component for organizing content into switchable panels with underline or pill variants.
usage_guidelines: Use to organize related content into separate views.
Compose with TabList, Tab, and TabContent components.
Set defaultValue for initial active tab.
Handle onChange to respond to tab switches.
Choose variant based on design needs (underline or pill).

onChange.description: Callback fired when active tab changes.

styling_info.visual_description: Underline variant: tabs with bottom border indicator. Pill variant: tabs with rounded background. Active tab is highlighted with primary color.

Dont: Don't use for too many tabs (use Menu instead)
Don't forget to manage active state

ControlledTabs.title: Controlled Tabs
ControlledTabs.code:
import { useState } from 'react' import Tabs from '@/components/ui/Tabs' const { TabNav, TabList, TabContent } = Tabs const ControlledTabs = () => { const [currentTab, setCurrentTab] = useState('tab1') return (

) } export default ControlledTabs

Tabs.description: Root component that provides tab context.

defaultValue.description: Default active tab for uncontrolled mode.

icon.description: Icon to display in the tab.

Tabs.TabContent.description: Content panel displayed when its tab is active.

value.description: Tab value this content belongs to.
